name: @brika/di
description: Angular-style functional dependency injection: inject(Token) backed by an AsyncLocalStorage injection context, hierarchical injectors, useClass/useValue/useFactory/useExisting providers, lazy root singletons, and one-line mock overrides for tests. No decorators, no reflection. Runtime-agnostic (workerd + bun), so hono and tanstack share one DI.
author: Brika Labs
